summary: Phase 9 (Identity & Access + Billing & Usage) testing completed. Backend: 23/23 tests pass. Fixed 3 bugs. One frontend route issue found.

fixed.issue: Missing team context - was using user.get('team_id') instead of get_current_team
UsageLimitError not caught in error handler

ui_bugs.issue: Route /api-keys is intercepted by K8s ingress and routed to backend API instead of React app

action_items: Rename /api-keys route to /settings/api-keys or /developer/api-keys to avoid conflict with /api/* ingress rules
Or configure ingress to only match /api/[a-z]+ patterns (not /api-keys)
critical_code_review_comments: Frontend route /api-keys conflicts with backend API routing prefix /api/*
Password reset rate limiting is working correctly (3 per email per hour)
API key limit is working correctly (2 per team for free plan)

success_rate.backend: 100% (23/23 tests passed, 3 skipped due to rate limit)
success_rate.frontend: 80% - Forgot Password, Reset Password, Billing pages work. API Keys page has routing issue

seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test API keys during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 9 backend APIs work correctly. Frontend /api-keys route has K8s ingress conflict. OAuth providers show as disabled (no GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID/GITHUB_CLIENT_ID configured). Stripe billing is MOCKED (no STRIPE_SECRET_KEY). Email service is MOCKED (no RESEND_API_KEY).

backend_api.notes: Rate limited to 3/hour per email - working correctly
Creates API key with hic_ prefix, respects 2-key limit for free plan

frontend_ui.notes: Email form, submit button, login link all present
Shows 'Invalid Reset Link' with request new link button
Shows current plan (Free), usage (0/100), available plans
Route /api-keys intercepted by K8s ingress - returns 404 JSON

mocked_apis_list: Email sending via Resend API (RESEND_API_KEY not configured)
